reviews.comment:

You can never park, it's full of cones. And you have too many security guards... terrible.

Da gusto ir al ACA.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
No vayan a la noche porque no hay personal suficiente y tardan un montón en cargarte nafta ! Y encima  ves que se ponen a hablar con el de seguridad y siguen tardando

(Translated by Google)
Don't go at night because there aren't enough staff and it takes ages to fill up your tank! And then you see them talking to security and it still takes forever.
